description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk Docker image with two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a job named build that runs `javac -Xlint Calculator.java` and stores the resulting Calculator.class as an artifact. In the test stage add a job named module tests that executes four shell tests: `test $(java Calculator 1 + 1) = 2`, `test $(java Calculator 100 - 10) = 90`, `test $(java Calculator 25 \* 5) = 125`, and `(! java Calculator 30 / 5)`. No caches, services, or conditional rules are defined.
